LCC-MS6-L1-6501000-MSSCI6-FFR-IMR-02 • MS Science Grade 6 • Energy Transfer and Changes in Kinetic Energy

The Ramp to 4B

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students mainly doing in the conversation?
2QUESTION 2: According to the girl, what makes a moving box hit the curb harder?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen for the moment the girl says what they are about to do. Listen for the moment she says what makes a box hit harder. Listen for the moment the boy says what he will do next.
